naturalQuery.title: Search Query
naturalQuery.description: Natural-language job search. You can include filter words like: entry-level, senior, full-time, part-time, contract, remote, hybrid, on-site, past 24 hours, past week, past month. Example: 'entry-level aiml engineer full-time remote posted in the past week'

geoId.title: LinkedIn GeoId (optional)
geoId.description: LinkedIn numeric geoId for more precise location filtering. Common IDs — Bangalore: 105214831 | Hyderabad: 105556635 | Mumbai: 102713980 | Delhi: 102713980 | Chennai: 102713980 | Remote: 92000000

pages.title: Pages to scrape
pages.description: Each page yields up to 25 job listings.

delayBetweenJobs.title: Delay between job detail fetches (ms)
delayBetweenJobs.description: Milliseconds to wait between fetching individual job pages. Keep at 3000+ to avoid rate-limiting.

delayBetweenPages.title: Delay between listing pages (ms)
delayBetweenPages.description: Milliseconds to wait between fetching search result pages.
